comments.author: md++ Fixture Reviewer
comments.scopeText: COMMENT_TARGET_STYLE_CLASS: This warning callout tests a named paragraph style that should map to {.callout-warning}. Unknown classes should remain in the Markdown source.
comments.commentText: Exporter should map this paragraph style to a safe md++ class and preserve this comment in a sidecar metadata file.

comments.author: md++ Fixture Reviewer
comments.scopeText: COMMENT_TARGET_TABLE: The next table deliberately uses merged cells and nested-looking content. It should not be forced into a plain GFM table if structure would be lost.
comments.commentText: Exporter should not silently flatten this complex table into GFM when merged-cell structure would be lost.

comments.author: md++ Fixture Reviewer
comments.scopeText: COMMENT_TARGET_UNSUPPORTED: The text box above is an unsupported freeform object test. Exporter should emit a static asset, placeholder, omission, or MDPP0700-range diagnostic.
comments.commentText: Exporter should emit a placeholder, static asset, omission, or MDPP0700-range diagnostic for this freeform object.
